results.rendered_html: pūrvam (am), ind. before (also as a prep. with abl.), formerly, hitherto, previously (sometimes with pres.),  RV.  &c. &c. (often ibc., e.g. pūrva-kārin, active before, pūrvokta, said b˚; also ifc. in the sense of ‘with’ e.g. prīti-pūrvam, with love; mati-pūrvam with intention, intentionally; mṛdu-pūrva-√bhāṣ, to speak kindly; cf. above; also with an ind.p., e.g. pūrva-bhojam, or -bhuktvā, having eaten b˚,  Pāṇ. iii, 4, 24 ; adya-p˚, until now, hitherto; p˚ -tataḥ, first-then; pūrva-paścāt, previously-afterwards; pūrva-upari, previously-subsequently; pūrva-adhūnā or adya, formerly-now)
